[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 00000011 2

01 10 10101000 3
12 21 00000100 1
23 32 00000001 1
34 43 00000001 1
45 54 00011111 5
56 65 00001111 4
67 76 10001000 2
70 07 10101000 3

02 20 00000011 2 match 7
13 31 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5 6
24 42 00010111 4
35 53 00000001 1
46 64 00001111 4
57 75 00111000 3
60 06 10001011 4
71 17 10101000 3

03 30 00000001 1
14 41 00001100 2
25 52 00010111 4
36 63 00000001 1
47 74 00011000 2
50 05 00101011 4
61 16 11001100 4
72 27 00010000 1

04 40 00001011 3
15 51 00101100 3
26 62 00000111 3
37 73 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5 6
